text: Washington:Former US president Donald Trump has criticised the opening ceremony of the Summer Olympics in Paris, calling it a "disgrace", amidst outrage over a scene which critics say parodied Leonardo da Vinci’s acclaimed painting "The Last Supper."
title: Olympics opening ceremony a disgrace: Donald Trump
author: PTI

keywords: Donald Trump, Paris Olympics, Last Supper,  Leonardo da Vinci, latest  news
